\u00a74.title: 4. System overview
\u00a74.notes: High-level architecture. BaseBrowser interface exists; SPA shell not yet built.

\u00a75.title: 5. Pattern schema
\u00a75.notes: Day-1 contract locked. Pattern + PatternMatch + PatternLibrary interfaces all present and tested.

\u00a75a.title: 5a. KeyboardIR (keyboard intermediate representation)
\u00a75a.notes: KeyboardIR types present (2026-06-08 amendment). Engine parse/emit not yet built.

\u00a76.title: 6. Worked example
\u00a76.notes: Narrative walkthrough; validated by acceptance scenarios in §15.

\u00a77.title: 7. Strategy selection
\u00a77.notes: A1-A7 axis types + strategy catalog types present. Decision tree engine (§7.2) + S-01..S-12 selectors not yet built.

\u00a78.title: 8. Data flow
\u00a78.notes: CharacterDiscovery + LinguistInventory types exist. Survey-to-pattern pipeline not yet wired.

\u00a79.title: 9. Three-group routing
\u00a79.notes: Gallery routing (supported / CJK+Ethiopic stub / legacy) not yet built. D5 governs CJK/Ethiopic out-of-scope stub.

\u00a710.title: 10. Validator and lint engine
\u00a710.notes: All three-layer interfaces typed. Layer A 9 TS-portable checks + 5 WASM-only not yet implemented. D3 governs 300ms debounce.

\u00a711.title: 11. Virtual FS
\u00a711.notes: In-memory FS mirroring keymanapp/keyboards layout. Serialized at output time to .zip or GitHub OAuth fork+PR. Not yet built beyond the output service stub.

\u00a712.title: 12. Output artifacts
\u00a712.notes: VirtualFS + OutputService + Scaffolder interfaces typed. ZIP serialisation and GitHub OAuth fork+PR not yet built. D6 governs desktop-first scope.

\u00a713.title: 13. Team boundaries
\u00a713.notes: Governance: engine vs content team split. Informs package ownership, not runtime code.

\u00a714.title: 14. Open questions — resolved decisions
\u00a714.notes: Decision ledger. Drift here means a decision was re-opened or a new one added.

\u00a715.title: 15. Acceptance scenarios
\u00a715.notes: End-to-end scenarios not yet wired as test vectors. See km-testing backlog.

\u00a716.title: 16. Out of scope
\u00a716.notes: Scope boundary definition. Drift here means v1 scope silently expanded.

\u00a718.title: 18. Revision policy
\u00a718.notes: Schema change governance; enforced by convention, not code.
